channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-3804] Interop 2.1.5<->2.5 failure on test suite recovery-small test_10
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: http://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/00658738-06e0-11e3-87de-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_10 failed with the following error:

test_10 failed with 3

client console:

04:51:02:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == recovery-small test 10: finish request on server after client eviction (bug 1521) == 04:51:01 (1376653861)
04:51:02:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mcreate /mnt/lustre/f10
04:51:02:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl set_param fail_loc=0x305
04:51:02:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: chmod 0777 /mnt/lustre/f10
04:51:02:LustreError: 3964:0:(libcfs_fail.h:84:cfs_fail_check_set()) *** cfs_fail_loc=305 ***
04:51:02:LustreError: 32111:0:(libcfs_fail.h:84:cfs_fail_check_set()) *** cfs_fail_loc=305 ***
04:51:13:LustreError: 31276:0:(libcfs_fail.h:84:cfs_fail_check_set()) *** cfs_fail_loc=305 ***
04:51:13:LustreError: 31276:0:(libcfs_fail.h:84:cfs_fail_check_set()) Skipped 1 previous similar message
04:51:14:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl set_param fail_loc=0
04:51:14:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: touch /mnt/lustre/f10
04:51:14:LustreError: 167-0: This client was evicted by lustre-MDT0000; in progress operations using this service will fail.
04:51:14:LustreError: 3979:0:(mdc_locks.c:736:mdc_enqueue()) ldlm_cli_enqueue: -4
04:51:14:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: checkstat -v -p 0777 /mnt/lustre/f10
04:51:14:LustreError: 9422:0:(client.c:1060:ptlrpc_import_delay_req()) @@@ IMP_INVALID  req@ffff88032c42b800 x1443519267477465/t0(0) o101->lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff88030ac9b400@192.168.4.21@o2ib:28/4 lens 296/352 e 0 to 0 dl 0 ref 1 fl Rpc:/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1
04:51:14:LustreError: 9422:0:(client.c:1060:ptlrpc_import_delay_req()) Skipped 2 previous similar messages
04:51:14:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark  recovery-small test_10: @@@@@@ FAIL: test_10 failed with 3 
04:51:14:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: recovery-small test_10: @@@@@@ FAIL: test_10 failed with 3
item.summary: Interop 2.1.5<->2.5 failure on test suite recovery-small test_10

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Close old bug that has not been hit in a long time.
